diff:
diff --git a/src/preview.py b/src/preview.py
index 09f54fe..2deedbe 100644
--- a/src/preview.py
+++ b/src/preview.py
@@ -3,4 +3,8 @@ def preview_text(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
         raise ValueError("limit must be non-negative")
     if len(text) <= limit:
         return text
-    return text[:limit] + "..."
+    # When truncating, include the ellipsis within the limit
+    if limit <= 3:
+        return text[:limit]
+    else:
+        return text[:limit - 3] + "..."
